cytokineFindeR 0.99.0
  • Reference
    • LRI Database Curation for Benchmarking
    • cytokineFindeR-introduction
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

benchlist_to_tbl()
Convert nested benchmark results to tibble format
cfgsea()
Gene Set Enrichment Analysis
clean_eset()
Given an expression set, make sure that data is cleaned by gene name using a provided gene list data frame
create_db_space()
Create an LRI database space
create_design()
Helper fun to create the design matrix
create_ensemble_results()
Create ensemble results combining LRI-based and CytoSig methods
cytosig_beta
CytoSig Betas
cytosig_custom_ridge()
Run CytoSig Custom Ridge Regression function
dbs_all
Database List unfiltered
dbs_cytosig
Database List to make comparable benchmarks against CytoSig
dbs_subset
Small Database example
extract_ligands() process_method_db() summarize_df() reshape_metric()
Extract specific ligands and merge results based on a chosen metric
golimumab
Golimumab Treatment Dataset (GSE92415)
gsva_limma()
Gene Set Variation Analysis for cytokines (cGSVA)
gsva_plsda()
Calculate coefficients from variable selection using GSVA and PLS-DA
pca_limma()
Calculate top ligands using a PCA approach from receptor genes given a database
pca_plsda()
Perform PCA and fit a multivariate regression to measure ligand activity
preprocess_eset()
Preprocess the eset
retrieve_geo()
Retrieve GEO data using the Bioconductor package GEOquery, clean it up, and store in a df list
run_cytokinefinder()
Wrapper function to run complete cytokinefinder benchmarking workflow with preprocessing
run_limma()
Run limma in unpaired or paired mode
run_lri_methods()
The core function to run benchmarking of several methods

Developed by Jeffrey Tang, Amrit Singh.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
